project_type: React Native + Expo social network mobile app with Node.js serverless backend
build_system: Expo managed workflow with npm. Backend uses Vercel serverless functions.
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install deps. 2. Run npx expo export --platform web to verify build. 3. Run npx jest --passWithNoTests to run tests. 4. TypeScript check with npx tsc --noEmit.
setup_instructions: 1. cd /projects/sandbox/San-Mes 2. npm install 3. npx expo start (for development)
environment_constraints: Node.js v22 available. OPEN_INTERNET mode - full package install access. No physical iOS/Android device for testing but can verify build/compilation. Expo Go will be used by user on real iPhone for testing.
contribution_requirements: All code goes to the repository. Must be immediately runnable with npm install && npx expo start.
key_patterns: Expo Router for file-based routing in app/ directory. Zustand for state management. React Native Reanimated for animations. Custom design system with tokens. Serverless API functions in api/ directory for Vercel deployment.
directory_structure: app/ - Expo Router pages and layouts. src/theme/ - design system tokens and theme provider. src/components/ - reusable UI components. src/store/ - Zustand stores. api/ - Vercel serverless functions. assets/ - fonts and images.
